2606.14507.title: Dense Coordinate-List Fine-Tuning Induces a Controllable Interference Surface in Vision-Language Models
2606.14507.paper_summary: Fine-tuning vision-language models to emit dense coordinate lists improves visual grounding but also changes how models serialize, repeat, and terminate structured outputs. We study this behavior as a generation and control surface. In Gemma 4 12B, high-capacity q/k/v/o LoRA raises class-aware F1@0.3 from 0.007 to 0.448 while inducing repeated-tail pressure (duplicate rate 0.080, max repeat 23). A q/v rank sweep keeps max repeat at 21-22 across ranks 4-64, showing capacity persistence. The target signal is separable: object-level repeat-stop removes exact repeated records (duplicate rate 0.000, max repeat 1) while preserving F1 (0.494 to 0.490) and stricter F1@0.5 (0.381 to 0.385). Structure-axis probes localize the effect to bbox-coordinate object lists; dense non-bbox and spatial/count JSON remain repeat-clean, including under high-capacity adapters. Qwen3-VL-8B reproduces a clean controlled endpoint (F1@0.3 0.318, duplicate rate 0.000), and COCO 2017 reproduces acquisition plus duplicate pressure. Dense coordinate-list adaptation therefore creates a structure-bound, cross-family interference surface that can be measured and controlled.
2606.14507.paper_summary_zh: 微調視覺-語言模型以發出密集的座標列表改善了視覺定位，但也改變了模型序列化、重複和終止結構化輸出的方式。我們將這種行為視為生成和控制表面。在 Gemma 4 12B 中，高容量的 q/k/v/o LoRA 將類別感知的 F1@0.3 從 0.007 提升至 0.448，同時引發重複尾壓（重複率 0.080，最大重複 23）。q/v 排序掃描使最大重複保持在 21-22，顯示出容量的持續性。目標信號是可分離的：物體級的重複停止移除精確的重複記錄（重複率 0.000，最大重複 1），同時保持 F1（0.494 到 0.490）和更嚴格的 F1@0.5（0.381 到 0.385）。結構軸探針將影響定位於 bbox-座標物體列表；密集的非 bbox 和空間/計數 JSON 在高容量適配器下仍然保持清晰的重複性。Qwen3-VL-8B 重現了一個乾淨的控制端點（F1@0.3 0.318，重複率 0.000），而 COCO 2017 則重現了獲取加上重複壓力。因此，密集座標列表的適應創造了一個結構界限的跨家族干擾表面，可以被測量和控制。
2606.14507.author: Chenyu Zhou et.al.
2606.14507.authors: Chenyu Zhou, Qiliang Jiang, Boguang Pan
